case_title: MARIE MARGARET ROPCHAN VS. HILL & CO. PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERT GEBRON-HILL & CO, & JAMES ROBINSON-BOARD MEMBER LAGUNA HTS. COOP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROPCHAN, MARIE MARGARET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HILL & CO. PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
